name: Rose Tentacles
name_jp: ローズ・テンタクルス
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. At the start of your Battle Phase, for each Plant monster your opponent currently controls, this card gains 1 additional attack during each Battle Phase this turn. Each time this card destroys a Plant monster by battle: Inflict 300 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. At the start of your Battle Phase, for each Plant monster your opponent currently controls, this card gains 1 additional attack during each Battle Phase this turn. Each time this card destroys a Plant monster by battle: Inflict 300 damage to your opponent.
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. At the start of your Battle Phase, for each Plant monster your opponent currently controls, this card gains 1 additional attack during each Battle Phase this turn. Each time this card destroys a Plant monster by battle: Inflict 300 damage to your opponent.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
